introSection: Rocket Cycles is a Zamperla motorbike coaster located at Adventureland in Sahara Center, Sharjah, United Arab Emirates.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 6 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 12 riders.

sections.title: Ride Experience
sections.content: The train makes a slight turn to the right before going to the lift hill. Near the top of the lift hill, the train goes up turning right again, then continues going straight. At the top of the lift hill, the train does a double Helix to the left, then goes straight for a few seconds then does a banked U-turn to the left. After the U-turn the train does a helix to the right, then goes forward a little, then turns left very little then turns to the right banked turn. The train hits the brake run, then U-turns right slowly. The train moves straight, then takes the final U-turn left, and the train reaches the station, doing another lap and stopping at the station.

sections.title: Coaster type
sections.content: The ride is the only thrill roller coaster at Adventureland, and the only Motocoaster in Sharjah.

fullText:
Rocket Cycles is a Zamperla motorbike coaster located at Adventureland in Sahara Center, Sharjah, United Arab Emirates.

Single train with 6 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 12 riders.

The train makes a slight turn to the right before going to the lift hill. Near the top of the lift hill, the train goes up turning right again, then continues going straight. At the top of the lift hill, the train does a double Helix to the left, then goes straight for a few seconds then does a banked U-turn to the left. After the U-turn the train does a helix to the right, then goes forward a little, then turns left very little then turns to the right banked turn. The train hits the brake run, then U-turns right slowly. The train moves straight, then takes the final U-turn left, and the train reaches the station, doing another lap and stopping at the station.

The ride is the only thrill roller coaster at Adventureland, and the only Motocoaster in Sharjah.
